title: OCI FinOps - Compartment Analysis
description: OCI compartment-level cost breakdown, trends, and comparisons

list.name: compartment
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT oci_compartmentname FROM oci_finops_reports WHERE oci_compartmentname IS NOT NULL ORDER BY oci_compartmentname

list.name: region
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT region FROM oci_finops_reports WHERE region IS NOT NULL ORDER BY region

list.name: service
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT servicename FROM oci_finops_reports WHERE servicename IS NOT NULL ORDER BY servicename

targets.rawSql: SELECT oci_compartmentname AS "Compartment", SUM(billedcost) AS "Cost" FROM oci_finops_reports WHERE billingperiodstart >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND oci_compartmentname IS NOT NULL AND ('\${compartment:raw}' = '' OR oci_compartmentname IN ($compartment)) AND ('\${region:raw}' = '' OR region IN ($region)) AND ('\${service:raw}' = '' OR servicename IN ($service)) GROUP BY oci_compartmentname ORDER BY "Cost" DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT oci_compartmentname AS "Compartment", SUM(billedcost) AS "Cost" FROM oci_finops_reports WHERE billingperiodstart >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND oci_compartmentname IS NOT NULL AND ('\${compartment:raw}' = '' OR oci_compartmentname IN ($compartment)) AND ('\${region:raw}' = '' OR region IN ($region)) GROUP BY oci_compartmentname ORDER BY "Cost" DESC

SELECT cost_date AS time, compartment_name AS metric, total_billed_cost AS value FROM mv_daily_cost_by_compartment WHERE cost_date >= $__timeFrom()::date AND cost_date <= $__timeTo()::date AND ('\${compartment:raw}' = '' OR compartment_name IN ($compartment)) AND compartment_name IN (SELECT compartment_name FROM mv_daily_cost_by_compartment GROUP BY compartment_name ORDER BY SUM(total_billed_cost) DESC LIMIT 10) ORDER BY cost_date

WITH current_month AS ( SELECT oci_compartmentname, SUM(billedcost) AS current_cost FROM oci_finops_reports WHERE billingperiodstart >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND oci_compartmentname IS NOT NULL GROUP BY oci_compartmentname ), prev_month AS ( SELECT oci_compartmentname, SUM(billedcost) AS prev_cost FROM oci_finops_reports WHERE billingperiodstart >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) - interval '1 month' AND billingperiodstart < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) AND oci_compartmentname IS NOT NULL GROUP BY oci_compartmentname ) SELECT c.oci_compartmentname AS "Compartment", c.current_cost AS "Current Month", COALESCE(p.prev_cost, 0) AS "Previous Month", c.current_cost - COALESCE(p.prev_cost, 0) AS "Change", CASE WHEN COALESCE(p.prev_cost, 0) > 0 THEN ROUND(((c.current_cost - p.prev_cost) / p.prev_cost) * 100, 1) ELSE NULL END AS "Change %" FROM current_month c LEFT JOIN prev_month p ON c.oci_compartmentname = p.oci_compartmentname WHERE ('\${compartment:raw}' = '' OR c.oci_compartmentname IN ($compartment)) ORDER BY c.current_cost DESC
